Title: xOrder — orders List Returns Customer Orders
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER authenticated. Account may or may not have orders — test asserts structural invariants, not row counts.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=orders_list] errors[] empty — schema resolves all requested CustomerOrderType fields (BL-GQL-002)
[DATA label=orders_list] data.orders is non-null
[COUNT label=orders_list] data.orders.totalCount >= 0
[DATA label=orders_list] data.orders.items is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [ROUNDTRIP label=orders_list] runner-manual: re-execute and confirm same totalCount
Failure_Signals: Runner DV-009 on renamed field (e.g. totalCount → count); errors[] non-empty; items is null while totalCount > 0; status enum value missing from schema

Title: xOrder — order Detail Query Returns Full Order by Number
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER authenticated with at least one existing order (runner captures most recent order number from list query before issuing detail query).
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=list_first] errors[] empty
[DATA label=list_first] data.orders.items.0.number is non-null
[ERRORS label=order_detail] errors[] empty — all requested CustomerOrderType fields resolve
[DATA label=order_detail] data.order is non-null
[DATA label=order_detail] data.order.number = {{ORDER_NUMBER}}
[DATA label=order_detail] data.order.id is non-null
[DATA label=order_detail] data.order.items is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [ROUNDTRIP label=order_detail] runner-manual: re-execute with same number → same order object
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty; data.order null despite valid number; items[] empty when line items exist; addresses[] empty for shipped order; MoneyType drift (currencyCode instead of currency.code)

Title: xOrder — CustomerOrderType Full-Field Schema Coverage
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER authenticated with at least one completed order containing items, addresses, payments, shipments. Schema coverage test — selects every CustomerOrderType scalar + nested-object field defined in graphql-schema.md to detect drift.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=list_first] errors[] empty
[DATA label=list_first] data.orders.items.0.number is non-null
[ERRORS label=order_full] errors[] empty — every CustomerOrderType field in graphql-schema.md must resolve; any schema drift yields entries
[DATA label=order_full] data.order is non-null
[DATA label=order_full] data.order.number = {{ORDER_NUMBER}}
[DATA label=order_full] data.order.id is non-null
[DATA label=order_full] data.order.status is non-null
[DATA label=order_full] data.order.customerId is non-null
[DATA label=order_full] data.order.storeId is non-null
[DATA label=order_full] data.order.createdDate is non-null
[DATA label=order_full] data.order.currency is non-null
[DATA label=order_full] data.order.total is non-null
[DATA label=order_full] data.order.subTotal is non-null
[DATA label=order_full] data.order.items is non-null
[DATA label=order_full] data.order.addresses is non-null
[DATA label=order_full] data.order.inPayments is non-null
[DATA label=order_full] data.order.shipments is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP label=order_full] runner-manual: re-execute → identical response structure
[MATH label=order_full] runner-manual: subTotal + shippingTotal + taxTotal - discountTotal ≈ total (within rounding tolerance) — runner-v2
Failure_Signals: Any CustomerOrderType field renamed/removed (DV-009); errors[] non-empty; MoneyType drift (currencyCode vs currency.code); addresses/items/inPayments/shipments null when order has them
References: xAPI; graphql-schema.md — CustomerOrderType, MoneyType, CurrencyType, OrderAddressType, OrderLineItemType, PaymentInType, ShipmentType

Title: xCart — initializeCartPayment Returns Skyflow publicParameters for Cart-Embedded Payment
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER authenticated. Builds a minimal cart (addItem), adds Skyflow payment row, then calls initializeCartPayment. addItem returns empty items[] (async settle) — cart ID captured from addOrUpdateCartPayment response per reference_additem_async_settle. Uses agent-pool user for isolation; AGENT-TEST- cleanup prefix conventions. Validates AllowCartPayment=true backend behavior (VCST-5009 PR#23).
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=setup_me] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=discover_product] errors[] empty
[DATA label=discover_product] data.products.items.0.id is non-null
[ERRORS label=add_item] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=add_payment] errors[] empty
[DATA label=add_payment] data.addOrUpdateCartPayment.id is non-null
[DATA label=add_payment] data.addOrUpdateCartPayment.payments.0.paymentGatewayCode = SkyflowPaymentMethod
[ERRORS label=init_cart_payment] errors[] empty
[DATA label=init_cart_payment] data.initializeCartPayment.isSuccess = true
[DATA label=init_cart_payment] data.initializeCartPayment.errorMessage is null
[COUNT label=init_cart_payment] data.initializeCartPayment.publicParameters.length > 0
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[EVIDENCE] publicParameters should include keys: accessToken, vaultURL, vaultID, tableName — inspect evidence JSON for key names
[STOREFRONT] After init, storefront Skyflow JS (js.skyflow.com v2.7.7) uses these publicParameters to initialize Skyflow Elements iframe
Failure_Signals: isSuccess=false; errorMessage non-null; publicParameters empty; CART_ID or PAYMENT_ID null (capture failed — check addOrUpdateCartPayment response shape); errors[] non-empty on init_cart_payment
Cleanup:
[AUTH role=ORG_USER]
[GQL-OP final_clear]
  mutation { clearCart(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" cultureName: "{{culture}}" currencyCode: "{{currency}}" }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC final_clear]
References: VCST-5009; PR#23 (vc-module-skyflow AllowCartPayment=true); graphql-schema.md initializeCartPayment → InputInitializeCartPaymentType

Title: xCart — initializeCartPayment With Invalid cartId Returns errors[] INVALID_OPERATION (No 500)
Section: GraphQL > xOrder > Cart Payment Init > Negative
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER authenticated. Passes a well-formed but non-existent GUID as cartId. Validates safe-cast change in ProcessPaymentAsync (PR#23) — a 500 response here means the old hard-cast exception is back.
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] HTTP status must be 200 (GQL errors are protocol-level, not HTTP-level); a 500 HTTP is the regression signal
Failure_Signals: HTTP 500 (safe-cast regression — PR#23 fixed the hard cast; 500 means the fix regressed); errors[] empty with isSuccess=true for bogus IDs; null response body
References: VCST-5009; PR#23 safe-cast fix (PaymentIn cast in ProcessPaymentAsync); graphql-schema.md

Title: xCart — cart.availablePaymentMethods Exposes SkyflowPaymentMethod with allowCartPayment=true
Section: GraphQL > xOrder > Cart Payment Init > Schema
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER authenticated. Cart must have ≥1 item so availablePaymentMethods is populated. Validates AllowCartPayment property exposed on PaymentMethodType (new field in VCST-5009 PR#23).
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=setup_me] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=add_item] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=read_cart] errors[] empty
[DATA label=read_cart] data.cart.availablePaymentMethods is non-null
[COUNT label=read_cart] data.cart.availablePaymentMethods.length > 0
[DATA label=read_cart] data.cart.availablePaymentMethods[?code=SkyflowPaymentMethod].code = SkyflowPaymentMethod
[DATA label=read_cart] data.cart.availablePaymentMethods[?code=SkyflowPaymentMethod].allowCartPayment = true
[VAR] {{SKY_ALLOW_CART}} = true
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] allowCartPayment=true confirms vc-module-skyflow SkyflowPaymentMethod.AllowCartPayment property override is wired to the xAPI schema field
Failure_Signals: SkyflowPaymentMethod absent from availablePaymentMethods (AllowCartPayment not set or not exposed); allowCartPayment=false or null (backend property not mapped to schema field); errors[] non-empty on read_cart
Cleanup:
[AUTH role=ORG_USER]
[GQL-OP final_clear]
  mutation { clearCart(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" cultureName: "{{culture}}" currencyCode: "{{currency}}" }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC final_clear]
References: VCST-5009; PR#23; graphql-schema.md — CartType.availablePaymentMethods; note: allowCartPayment field added by VCST-5009, not yet in graphql-schema.md snapshot — schema snapshot refresh needed
